name: Caterpillar
description: A large, slow, and generally calm caterpillar that wanders through several open park zones. It is not threatening through speed, but it is a useful health sponge when you need its materials.
behavior: It moves slowly, feeds, and crosses low vegetation without any real urgency. Its presence rarely changes the pace of an area unless something more aggressive decides to treat it as prey.
interactionWithPlayer: It rarely starts a fight on its own. If you decide to attack it, the encounter is more about patience and positioning than raw reflexes.
interactionWithCreatures: Its slow pace makes it potential prey for several predators. Rather than dominating an area, it usually acts as living scenery until something decides to bite it.
strategy: Exploit its slow pace and do not overcommit your swings. It is not a difficult fight, but it is the kind where boredom can still cost you time if you get sloppy.
